_comment: Stream Video Configuration - Customize all settings for stream video generation
_note: This file controls all aspects of stream video generation including title pause, audio mixing, and outro settings

title_pause._comment: Settings for the 3-second title pause screen at the start of each video
title_pause._note_duration: Duration of the title pause in seconds
title_pause._note_margins: Left and right margins in pixels. Controls how much space from the edges of the video.
title_pause._note_font_sizes: Font sizes in pixels. Center line will be bigger and yellow by default.
title_pause._note_colors: Colors for the center line (highlighted) and other lines. Can use color names (white, yellow, red, blue, green) or hex format like #FFFFFF
title_pause._note_line_spacing: Spacing between lines in pixels. Higher value = more space between lines.
title_pause._note_visual_gap_adjustment: Visual adjustment in pixels to compensate for perceived spacing differences. Positive values reduce gap above center line / increase gap below. Adjust if gaps appear unequal visually. Default: 15 (increase if gap above still looks larger, decrease if gap below becomes too large).
title_pause._note_hashtags: Whether to automatically remove hashtags (#matrix #shorts) from the title display

audio._comment: Audio mixing settings for stream videos
audio._note_pause_duration: Duration of the pause where only BGM plays (should match title_pause duration)
audio._note_bgm_volume: Background music volume multiplier (0.0 to 1.0). Lower values = quieter BGM.
audio._note_voice_volume: Voiceover volume multiplier (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values = louder voice.
audio._note_bgm_file: Path to background music file relative to project root

outro._comment: Settings for the outro scene (only added to the last video)
outro._note_enabled: Whether to add an outro scene to the last video
outro._note_narration: Default narration text for the outro scene
outro.subtitle: Subscribe for more
outro._note_subtitle: Subtitle text for the outro scene
outro._note_image_path: Path to outro image file relative to project root
outro._note_duration: Duration of the outro scene in seconds
outro._note_effect: Animation effect for the outro scene (zoom_in, zoom_out, ken_burns_in, etc.)

output._note_directory: Directory where generated videos will be saved
output._note_naming_format: Naming format: NN = zero-padded number (01, 02, etc.), title = sanitized title
output._note_sanitize: Whether to remove special characters from filenames for compatibility

text_processing._comment: Text processing settings for titles and narration
text_processing._note_apostrophe: Character to replace curly apostrophes/quotes with. Default is straight apostrophe ('). You can use any character like: ', `, or even remove it with empty string ''
text_processing._note_curly_quotes: Whether to replace curly quotes/apostrophes with the replacement character
